upgrade.name: upgrade
upgrade.title: CiviCRM Upgrade Available
upgrade.message:
6.0.0 was released on 2025-03-05. The latest patch revision is 6.0.3 (2025-03-22).
6.1.0 was released on 2025-04-03. The latest patch revision is 6.1.2 (2025-04-21).
6.2.0 was released on 2025-05-07.
6.3.0 was released on 2025-06-04. The latest patch revision is 6.3.1 (2025-06-05).
